creator: exploringlondon
caption:
ad This is how you can get your nails done for free in Waitrose Canary Wharf, all thanks to @drinklivingthings x @townhouse 💅🏽

It’s all celebrating the fact that you can now get free nail stickers in every promotional 4 pack of Living Things 🍋

Anyone can play their game and you can win a FREE MANICURE, or a free nail polish, a free soda, some stickers or even get a discount off your next manicure at Townhouse!

Details here:
📍 Waitrose, Canary Wharf @waitrose_canarywharf 
🗓️ Sunday 8th March - Saturday 14th March
⏰ Sun 8th: 12.30pm - 4.30pm, Mon-Fri: 11am-3pm, Sat 14th: 11am-6pm

#drinklivingthings #townhouse

transcription.text: Apparently you can go and get your nails done for free in the middle of Waitrose in Canary Wharf So let's go see if we can go and find them Just go through the main entrance, past the flowers and just by the self-checkout Here they are, the Living Things and Townhouse nail bar It's all celebrating Living Things having limited edition nail stickers in every promotional 4-pack And at the activation you can try some of the drinks which are all Natural, low in sugar, high in fibre and good for your gut And anyone can play their game Where you'll get a random number and that number corresponds to a prize There could be a discount on your next manicure at Townhouse A free soda, some stickers, a free Townhouse nail polish Or even getting your nails done for free And they'll add on the cute nail stickers It's such a fun activation with lots of freebies and it's on all week Find the details in the caption
